top_signals.title: Iran behind attack on cargo vessel near Oman in Strait of Hormuz, U.S. official tells MS NOW
top_signals.summary: "The only crop we're harvesting is what you planted: decades of mistrust," Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf said in a social media post.

top_signals.title: Zalando Probed by German Regulator Over Disclosure Issue
top_signals.summary: Zalando SE is being investigated by Germany’s financial regulator after failing to note in its annual report that Danish billionaire and biggest shareholder Anders Holch Povlsen also held a stake in a company it bought last year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: As Social Security faces trust fund depletion, some Washington lawmakers call for taxing high earners
top_signals.summary: High earners may only contribute Social Security payroll taxes for part of the year. As the program faces funding woes, some lawmakers say that should change.

top_signals.title: Fans take over iconic Shibuya Crossing as Japan reaches World Cup knockout round
top_signals.summary: Fans watched in packed bars, cafes and even on the side of the road as the Samurai Blue secured a second-place finish in Group F at the World Cup.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Largest wind farm in the United States slated to begin commercial operations
top_signals.summary: The SunZia Wind Project, the largest wind farm in the United States, is slated to begin commercial operations this month. The wind farm, located in New Mexico, has a total net summer generating capacity of 3,650 megawatts (MW) and is composed of 916 wind turbines. SunZia's capacity is more than three times larger than the next two largest wind farms, Alta Wind in Southern California (1,098 MW) and Great Prairie in northern Texas (1,027 MW). The SunZia Wind Project works with a high voltage transmission line to deliver the wind power generated to Arizona and California.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
